summary: top_recent and agent_bundle surface fetchBucket errors via NoticePartialFetchError instead of silently discarding them.
reason: Greptile P1 on PR #588 (round 2): a mid-pagination error returned partial reviews labeled complete with exit code 0. The new notice lets agents detect incomplete data.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; meta.notices includes partial_fetch_due_to_error when fetchBucket fails.
